summary: Completed comprehensive testing of KotlerX CMS features. All backend APIs (14/14 tests passed) and frontend UI flows working correctly. Landing page displays 3 hook point headlines from CMS. Admin CMS tab has all required functionality.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/cms/settings returns settings (public)
Backend: GET /api/cms/settings includes university_email field
Backend: PUT /api/cms/settings requires authentication (401)
Backend: PUT /api/cms/settings admin can update
Backend: GET /api/cms/landing returns landing content (public)
Backend: GET /api/cms/landing has 3 hook point headlines
Backend: GET /api/cms/landing has hero description
Backend: GET /api/cms/landing has stats
Backend: PUT /api/cms/landing requires authentication (401)
Backend: PUT /api/cms/landing admin can update content
Backend: POST /api/admin/test-email endpoint exists (returns 500 without real API key)
Backend: POST /api/admin/reports/email endpoint exists (returns 500 without real API key)
Backend: Admin login success (admin@kotlerx.com / admin123)
Backend: Admin login fails with wrong password (401)
Frontend: Landing page loads with 3 hook point headlines
Frontend: Landing page displays CMS content (headlines, description, stats)
Frontend: Admin Panel has 'CMS & Settings' tab
Frontend: CMS tab has University Email input with data-testid
Frontend: CMS tab has Save Settings button
Frontend: CMS tab has Send Test Email button
Frontend: CMS tab has Email Weekly Report button
Frontend: CMS tab has Email Monthly Report button
Frontend: CMS tab has 3 headline inputs (Headline 1, 2, 3)
Frontend: CMS tab has Hero Description input
Frontend: CMS tab has 4 stats inputs (Students, Programs, Placement, Partners)
Frontend: CMS tab has Save Landing Page button
Frontend: Save Settings button updates university email
Frontend: Save Landing Page button updates content (shows success toast)
Frontend: Send Test Email shows expected error (API key invalid - MOCKED)
Frontend: Email Weekly Report shows expected error (API key invalid - MOCKED)
seed_data_creation: CMS settings and landing content updated during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: CMS features are fully functional. Landing page fetches content from /api/cms/landing and displays 3 hook points. Admin can edit all content via CMS & Settings tab. Email sending requires real Resend API key (currently placeholder).

mocked_apis.Email sending: Requires real Resend API key (RESEND_API_KEY=re_placeholder in backend/.env) - buttons work but email fails

landing_page_cms.3_hook_headlines: Working - Displays 3 catchy hook point headlines from CMS
landing_page_cms.hero_description: Working - Displays hero description from CMS
landing_page_cms.stats_section: Working - Displays 4 stats (Students, Programs, Placement, Partners) from CMS
landing_page_cms.cms_content_fetch: Working - Fetches content from /api/cms/landing on page load

admin_cms_tab.tab_exists: Working - 'CMS & Settings' tab visible in Admin Panel
admin_cms_tab.save_settings_btn: Working - Saves university email to database
admin_cms_tab.test_email_btn: Working - Button exists, fails without real API key (expected)
admin_cms_tab.email_weekly_btn: Working - Button exists, fails without real API key (expected)
admin_cms_tab.email_monthly_btn: Working - Button exists, fails without real API key (expected)
admin_cms_tab.headline_inputs: Working - 3 headline inputs with data-testid attributes
admin_cms_tab.stats_inputs: Working - 4 stat inputs (students, programs, placement, partners)
admin_cms_tab.save_landing_btn: Working - Saves landing content to database, shows success toast
